description: SaasAnt Transactions has changed the way I look at problems in my work. It's so useful and powerful that it has inspired me to learn new and interesting ways to use Excel, then, in turn, those skills have allowed me to get even more out of SaasAnt Transactions. We have been able to create efficiency in a number of repetitive tasks using a combination of Excel and SaasAnt. I have cut the time I spend to enter one client's weekly income from 4 hours to about 2, and have turned Payroll Allocations from a 2 hours process to a half hour. I can't imagine going back to a world without SaasAnt. Our firm was hesitant to use other Import tools as they were very expensive, and we weren't sure we would get the full value out of them. We use SaasAnt for pretty much every client we have in QuickBooks Online now, since SaasAnt is so affordable and easy to scale.
author: Shea T.
pros: The ability to import pretty much any type of information that exists in QuickBooks Online. The ability to map existing reports to fields in QuickBooks Online. The ability to save mappings to use over and over again. Support that knows their product. Import, Export, and Delete features all rolled into one product.
cons: There is a learning curve to using the software, for sure. You need to understand how it imports different transactions types and list items differently. You may have issues with duplicate accounts or other list items if you aren't careful to verify and validate your data.

review_title: Saasant is a great option for Importing files, especially with Quickbooks Online
description: Overall I am very pleased. Attempting to import the transactions without the program was tedious and with numerous errors. Upon using Saasant, the process became much simpler with easy changes if an error occurred. No comparison from before Saasant to after it.
author: Trina S.
pros: The program is able to convert different file extensions. I am currently using for .cvs and .iff. It is able to distinguish the current field name conventions in order to match them, or you can choose a different naming convention (not sure why you would). Upon import, it then displays the transactions for review and/or change prior to posting. In the event of an error, it will advise. You can then correct it and repost.
cons: The date format. I wish it could recognize the date format being used and then allow a mass date format change. I'm importing from two different programs using two different date formates, which then requires me to change the date format first in settings, prior to importing the files.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, it simplifies my month end and increases the accuracy of my entries. I don't use it for much else but it's worth it for those things!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This doesn't have a lot of bells and whistles (or at least I don't use them if they do!) but it's great for what it is: a simple way to import journal entries or other items into QBO. The price isn't bad for a year, though I don't come close to using all my credits so I wish there was a "starter" plan.
cons: The interface isn't that intuitive. I have to choose "Bulk Upload" to upload one entry, or if there's another way, I don't know where!

review_title: It saves me a lot of time
description: Overall, I like it. Mostly because it saves me time when I dont have other ways of entering these kind of transactions
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I use SaaSAnt for bills that I dont have the time to split the charges into clients and SaaSant makes this really simple.
cons: Sometimes it's not easy to map fields and It took some days to understand how it worked, but now that i am used I like it.

author: surjit M.
pros: i have great experience with [sensitive content hidden], she did really good job. fix the issue. she's the best .
cons: easy use.

author: Madolen G.
pros: I've been utilizing the services of SaasAnt Transactions for quite some time now, and I can confidently say that they have set the gold standard when it comes to customer service and providing indispensable software solutions for ecommerce brands. First and foremost, let's talk about their customer service. The support team at SaasAnt Transactions goes above and beyond to ensure that any concerns or queries are addressed promptly and effectively. Whether it's troubleshooting technical issues or providing guidance on optimizing their software for my specific needs, they consistently deliver exceptional service with a personal touch that is truly commendable. Now, let's dive into their software. In a landscape where ecommerce platforms are a dime a dozen, SaasAnt Transaction's software stands out as a game-changer. It's not just another tool in the toolbox; it's an invaluable asset that has significantly streamlined my operations and enhanced the overall efficiency of my ecommerce business reporting. The features and functionalities offered by their software are robust, intuitive, and tailored to meet the diverse needs of modern ecommerce brands looking for an affordable option to import and export data. What truly sets SaasAnt Transactions apart, however, is their unwavering commitment to innovation and continuous improvement. They don't rest on their laurels; instead, they are constantly evolving and refining their software to stay ahead of the curve and anticipate the evolving needs of their customers. In conclusion, I cannot recommend SaasAnt Transactions highly enough. Their exceptional customer service, coupled with their indispensable software solutions, make them an indispensable partner for any ecommerce business. If you're in the market for a reliable partner who truly cares about your success, look no further than SaasAnt Transactions. They have earned my trust and loyalty, and I look forward to continuing to work with them for many years to come.
cons: Occasionally, our account would have a few issues with errors importing. However, the customer service team was always impeccable in making sure our concerns were addressed and fixed promptly.

description: Overall, SaasAnt has been great for us and helped to really streamline payroll allowing us to easily import information from our time/po to quickbooks.
author: Jamie G.
pros: SaasAnt makes accounting easy because it integrates with our Quickbooks. We can do bulk imports of info via SaasAnt and it makes it so streamlined to move info.
cons: At this time the only con would be the times that SaasAnt is down and we are unable to process payroll until we can upload the info but normally they have it fixed fast.

description: [sensitive content hidden] was incredibly helpful at every turn, given the challenges with formatting from QB desktop 2020 to QB desktop 2024 Accountant. He is very easy to understand and work with. Very much appreciate him and his talents.
author: Jerry K.
pros: Connectivity with QB 2020 and QB 2024. The ability to check transactions outside of QB in addition to several upload, export, import transactions, as well as, migrations from QB 2020 to QB 2024.
cons: Nothing so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Shaq M.
pros: We have over 10k transactions we used to enter manually. Through SaaSant that has been reduced to 2 hours by the finance manager. It used to take a team of 3 fulltime bookkeepers.
cons: Not really an issue with SaaSant, but quickbooks is a disaster of a software and sometimes there are issues with SaaSant syncing with QB. But they quickly resolve them.

author: Ravi L.
pros: Ease of Use Intelligent enough to identify the duplicate transactions

review_title: This is the best QBD builk import tool available
description: I was looking for a tool that could easily import our credit card transactions into Quickbooks Desktop. Our credit card rep informed me that I should look into Saasant, as it would allow me to pull in a list of transactions directly into Quickbooks. The first time I successfully imported our transactions, it was incredible!
author: Andrew L.
pros: Saasant is AMAZING! It has literally saved me hours of time in data entry and inputting bank and credit card transactions. Our credit card issuer is flexible and allows me to already list expense accounts and classes in the software, so all I have to do is download the spreadsheet, link the fields, and Saasant will import it directly into quickbooks and assign all the right accounts and classes.
cons: The interface is a bit outdated, and it has a slight learning curve. But you gain far more than that in the time it saves.

author: Ann O.
pros: it is very easy to get up and running and use
cons: I do not have any cons no cons - very easy to use

description: When any contact with their support has been required, they are always prompt and resolve the issue completely and with as little effort as possible from our end. Very appreciated!
author: Darin S.
pros: SaaSAnt Transactions is an intuitive and easily configured product for use in our QuickBooks integration. Performs flawlessly ever time.
cons: There are no complaints from our end regarding SaaSAnt Transactions.

description: I couldn't do my job without it! While my clients don't usually know that I've used SaasAnt as a tool to integrate their data, I am excited to have had the opportunity to share my "secret" with a major client who will now be ensuring all their service reps add SaasAnt to their QBO. Again, thank you [sensitive content hidden]!
author: Gina B.
pros: Whenever I set-up a new QuickBooks Online client, I use SaasAnt to transfer data from Excel to their new subscription. I've been using it for years (most of the time, the trial subscription is all I need for the client). I recently attained a client who will be setting up hundreds (yes, hundreds) of their sales agents with their own QuickBooks over the next year. They will be providing files these reps need to regular upload to their QBO. When we encountered an issue with some of the direct import features in QBO, I wondered if SaasAnt was the answer. With the help of my new friend, [sensitive content hidden] (and his wonderful insight), we found that the answer is YES!
cons: When I forget to map properly (user issue, not SaasAnt's fault lol)

description: 95% of the time it works great. Customer service is helpful, [sensitive content hidden] quickly helped me today. It's the 5% of the time when the imports fail, that frustrate me.
author: Karen R.
pros: I can take whatever data I have, put it into their premade templates & quickly import into QBO.
cons: I will use a spreadsheet format multiple times. Then it fails to upload. I contact support and they tell me something I've done for months is not correct & to change one thing. Then it works. Makes me think changes were made and then how I was do it no longer works. Since I keep documentation on how to create the files & the instructions get changed periodically.

description: We would highly recommend utilizing SaaSant to any company that has to deal with complex accounting issues.
author: TJ F.
pros: The user experience is amazing. But what is even better is there customer service. When we ran into issues utilizing the product for large-scale very complex data migrations, their customer service help this through the issues to make a complex job feel easy.
cons: No cons. Our entire experience was great.

author: Britt F.
pros: Ease of use of saasant. Support is quick to respond. Good value for the function that it gives.
cons: Mapping issue failure between old interface and new.

description: Excellent. I reached out to chat with a pretty basic import error (on my part). [sensitive content hidden] replied right away and walked me through the entire process. When we encountered an import error, even though there was only one, he stuck it out and figured it out. I could have easily just entered the information manually. But [sensitive content hidden] stuck it out and got to the bottom of the issue by trying different solutions. Fantastic customer support experience.
author: Marnie S.
pros: SaasAnt helps me import data with detail that I cannot get using the QBO import function featured in the product. I love the look of the new UI. The layout is straightforward and easy on the eyes and the colors, fonts, and graphics are well thought out.
cons: There was nothing that I disliked during this import process. All went well.

description: Overall, a great product with a great service team. Great job, Jeslin!
author: Cam B.
pros: SaasAnt is easy to install and has a very friendly user interface. It works well for integrating content into QBO.
cons: Some early technical glitches - but they were resolved by your customer service team.

author: Margarita Z.
pros: It is easy to use and makes importing bills/credits quickly
cons: Nothing

review_title: Mapping Issue Resolve by [sensitive content hidden]
author: Nitza U.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] answered my request for help immediately and was very careful and specific in his instructions. My issue was resolved with his help.
cons: Nothing, the customer support is very good. I have always get the help needed from them.

author: Dowton M.
pros: Ease of use and User friendly application
cons: No issues currently with the Savant applicaton

description: Overall a great software. I would suggest looking into using all of the capabilities it offers.
author: Dawn J.
pros: Saasant makes it very quick to convert entries like Comdata software to excel and into Quickbooks for expenditures. Basically it transfers expenses over to an excel spreadsheet. You then modify the spreed sheet to change to delete what is not needed. That process is super easy. Although I use this software for expenses only, it does much more. It can transfer checks, bills, bill payments, purchase orders, credit card credits, vendor credits, invoices, received payments, estimate credit memos, sales and refund receipts.
cons: There is nothing I do not like about this software! Honeslty speaking!

description: This product is a must if you want to upload your invoicing information into QuickBooks. I've been using it for four years and it's still an amazing productivity enhancer.
author: Sean L.
pros: It's extremely easy to use and very convenient.
cons: There is nothing negative to report presently.

review_title: Wish I got a head's up about the issues they were having
author: Barb A.
pros: Usually simple to use... but there was a internal error with SaasAnt that messed up my whole morning. Finally decided to use support and [sensitive content hidden] helped me right away. Wish I had contacted them sooner!
cons: If there is an outage or there is an internal problem, there is no notification to users. I spent WAY too long trying to fix something that was an internal error that I had no control over. The way I was using the file importer for 2 years no longer worked.
